Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: stairs by form [300003230], stairs (series of steps) [300003228], stairs and stair components [300073803], circulation elements [300003217], architectural elements [300000885], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Staircases that are circular in plan, consisting entirely of winders or wedge-shaped steps.

Source.Source_ID: 2000033931/Putnam and Carlson, Architectural and Building Trades Dictionary (1974)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Ronde trappen die volledig bestaan uit bochttreden of wigvormige treden.
外形迂迴環繞的樓梯結構，全部以螺旋形階梯或楔型台階組成。

Source.Source_ID: 2000033931/Putnam and Carlson, Architectural and Building Trades Dictionary (1974)
2000032401/Fleming et al., Penguin Dictionary of Architecture (1981)
2000032401/Fleming et al., Penguin Dictionary of Architecture (1981)
2000032401/Fleming et al., Penguin Dictionary of Architecture (1981)
2000051218/Alvarez et al., Diccionario de la decoración (1968)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: escalera de caracol de eje cerrado

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
